reviews.author: Harpreet Singh
reviews.review_body:
Hi,

This mail is regarding rude behaviour of principal of the school (Manjula Reddy)

Yesterday was the annual exam there was some amount remaining when we payed the fee the principal started to scream without any reason when we asked why are you screaming she said "main aisi hi hun",. Since the opening of this branch my daughter, son and three other relatives kids has studied here but this type of rude behaviour of principal i saw for the first time, she screamed and went sat in her office and didn't came out and was shouting from there and didn't talk to us and then she took her bag and ran from the school before the actual school time, it was very disrespectful, either you take the action or i will, i think if you take the action it would be nice if we take the action it wouldn't be good against Manjula Reddy

And i would like to have the contact number of the head office because there is no one good enough to talk in this branch(kanajiguda)

Thank you
